task_completion.description: Create a GET route for /privacy in the Socioboard PHP frontend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a routing file (e.g., routes/web.php) in /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/ being modified to add a GET route for '/privacy'.

task_completion.description: Create a view named privacy containing the policy text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a view file (e.g., privacy.blade.php or privacy.php) being created or edited to include the text from /home/ga/Documents/privacy_policy.txt.

task_completion.description: Include a link to the privacy policy on the main login page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the login page view file being modified to include the exact HTML: Privacy Policy.

task_completion.description: Ensure the new route and view are active and accessible at http://localhost/privacy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser navigated to http://localhost/privacy displaying the privacy policy text.

task_completion.description: Ensure the link is visible on the main login page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser navigated to the main login page (e.g., http://localhost/ or http://localhost/login) displaying the 'Privacy Policy' link.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to verify the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a graphical web browser opened to the local application, rather than relying solely on terminal curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the modified files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the files as saved (e.g., no unsaved indicator dot in VS Code), or terminal editors like nano/vim are shown saving and exiting.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to temporarily inject the HTML link or privacy text into the live page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The privacy policy text must be sourced from /home/ga/Documents/privacy_policy.txt. The route must be exactly '/privacy'. The link added to the login page must exactly match the HTML: Privacy Policy.
